accounts.name: cranker
docs: Cranker - anyone can call this (permissionless)

accounts.name: caller
docs: M-1 FIX: Only authority can initiate BPD finalization (prevents griefing)

accounts.name: claimer
docs: The wallet receiving the tokens (pays rent for ClaimStatus)

accounts.name: snapshot_wallet
docs: The snapshot wallet that signed the claim message
Must equal claimer - delegation not supported (see MEDIUM-3 security fix)

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority (must match GlobalState.authority)

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can seal the finalize phase

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can trigger BPD (permissionless)

errors.name: InvalidMintSpace
errors.msg: Failed to calculate mint account space

errors.name: AlreadyDistributedToday
errors.msg: Distribution already completed for current day

errors.name: BigPayDayNotAvailable
errors.msg: Big Pay Day not yet available

errors.name: NoEligibleStakers
errors.msg: No eligible stakers for Big Pay Day

errors.name: StakeNotBpdEligible
errors.msg: Stake not eligible for Big Pay Day

errors.name: RewardDebtOverflow
errors.msg: Reward debt calculation exceeds maximum storable value

errors.name: BpdCalculationNotComplete
errors.msg: BPD rate calculation not yet complete

errors.name: UnstakeBlockedDuringBpd
errors.msg: Unstaking is temporarily blocked during Big Pay Day calculation

errors.name: InvalidClaimPeriodId
errors.msg: Claim period ID must be greater than 0

errors.name: StakeNotFinalized
errors.msg: Stake not counted in BPD finalize phase

errors.name: BpdFinalizationIncomplete
errors.msg: BPD finalization incomplete - no stakes finalized

types.name: AdminMinted
docs: Emitted when authority mints tokens via admin_mint instruction.
Frontend note: Monitor for transparency. Production should use multisig authority.

types.name: ClaimConfig
docs: Global claim period configuration (singleton PDA)
Seeds: [b"claim_config"]

fields.name: authority
docs: DEPRECATED: Authority checked via GlobalState constraint. Kept for layout compatibility.

fields.name: merkle_root
docs: Merkle root of the snapshot

fields.name: total_claimable
docs: Total tokens available for claiming

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: Total tokens claimed so far

fields.name: claim_count
docs: Number of successful claims

fields.name: start_slot
docs: Slot when claim period started

fields.name: end_slot
docs: Slot when claim period ends (start + 180 days)

fields.name: claim_period_id
docs: Claim period identifier (for future multi-period support)

fields.name: claim_period_started
docs: True once claim period has started (merkle root immutable after this)

fields.name: big_pay_day_complete
docs: True once Big Pay Day has been triggered and fully distributed

fields.name: bpd_total_distributed
docs: Total tokens distributed via BPD

fields.name: total_eligible
docs: Total number of eligible addresses in snapshot

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: bpd_remaining_unclaimed
docs: Remaining unclaimed amount for BPD distribution (tracks across batches)
Set on first trigger_big_pay_day call, decremented with each batch

fields.name: bpd_total_share_days
docs: Total share-days accumulated across all BPD batches (for consistent rate calculation)
Stored as u128 to prevent overflow with large stake counts

fields.name: bpd_helix_per_share_day
docs: Pre-calculated BPD rate (Phase 3.2)

fields.name: bpd_calculation_complete
docs: True once finalize_bpd_calculation has processed all stakes

fields.name: bpd_snapshot_slot
docs: Slot pinned on first finalize batch for consistent days_staked calculation (Phase 3.3)

fields.name: bpd_stakes_finalized
docs: Count of unique stakes processed during finalize_bpd_calculation (Phase 3.3)

fields.name: bpd_stakes_distributed
docs: Count of unique stakes distributed to during trigger_big_pay_day (Phase 3.3)

types.name: ClaimStatus
docs: Per-user claim status tracking
Seeds: [b"claim_status", merkle_root[0..8], snapshot_wallet]
Note: Uses 8-byte merkle prefix to allow future claim periods while preventing collisions

fields.name: is_claimed
docs: True if user has claimed

fields.name: claimed_amount
docs: Amount claimed (base + bonus, before vesting split)

fields.name: claimed_slot
docs: Slot when claim was made

fields.name: bonus_bps
docs: Speed bonus applied (in bps: 0, 1000, or 2000)

fields.name: withdrawn_amount
docs: Cumulative amount withdrawn from vesting (security: prevents double-withdrawal)

fields.name: vesting_end_slot
docs: Slot when vesting completes (claimed_slot + 30 days)

fields.name: snapshot_wallet
docs: Original snapshot wallet (for verification)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that can update protocol parameters (future governance)

fields.name: mint
docs: HELIX token mint address

fields.name: mint_authority_bump
docs: Bump seed for mint authority PDA

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for GlobalState PDA

fields.name: annual_inflation_bp
docs: Annual inflation rate in basis points (3,690,000 = 3.69%)

fields.name: min_stake_amount
docs: Minimum stake amount in token base units (10,000,000 = 0.1 HELIX)

fields.name: share_rate
docs: Share rate: tokens per share (10,000 = 1:1 at launch). Increases over time.

fields.name: starting_share_rate
docs: Starting share rate for reference

fields.name: slots_per_day
docs: Slots per logical day (~216,000 at 400ms/slot)

fields.name: claim_period_days
docs: Claim period length in days

fields.name: init_slot
docs: Slot when protocol was initialized

fields.name: total_stakes_created
docs: Total number of stakes ever created (monotonically increasing)

fields.name: total_unstakes_created
docs: Total number of unstakes ever created (monotonically increasing)

fields.name: total_claims_created
docs: Total number of reward claims ever created (monotonically increasing)

fields.name: total_tokens_staked
docs: Total tokens currently staked

fields.name: total_tokens_unstaked
docs: Total tokens ever unstaked

fields.name: total_shares
docs: Total active T-shares

fields.name: current_day
docs: Current distribution day number

fields.name: total_admin_minted
docs: Total tokens minted via admin_mint

fields.name: max_admin_mint
docs: Maximum allowed admin mints (set at initialize)

fields.name: user
docs: Stake owner

fields.name: stake_id
docs: Unique stake ID (from GlobalState counter)

fields.name: staked_amount
docs: Tokens staked (base units, 8 decimals)

fields.name: t_shares
docs: T-shares earned (includes LPB + BPB bonuses, scaled by PRECISION)

fields.name: start_slot
docs: Slot when stake was created

fields.name: end_slot
docs: Slot when stake matures (start + duration_days * slots_per_day)

fields.name: stake_days
docs: Committed duration in days (1-5555)

fields.name: reward_debt
docs: Reward debt for lazy distribution (t_shares * share_rate at creation/last claim)

fields.name: is_active
docs: True if stake is active (false after unstake)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: bpd_bonus_pending
docs: Big Pay Day bonus pending (set by trigger_big_pay_day, claimed via claim_rewards)

fields.name: bpd_eligible
docs: DEPRECATED: Set by create_stake but never checked by finalize/trigger. Kept for layout compatibility.

fields.name: claim_period_start_slot
docs: DEPRECATED: Set by create_stake but never read. BPD uses slot range checks. Kept for layout compatibility.

fields.name: bpd_claim_period_id
docs: Last claim period that received BPD (0 = never, periods start at 1)

fields.name: bpd_finalize_period_id
docs: Last claim period where stake was counted in BPD finalize (0 = never)
